description_long: This house features a rectangular, multi-room layout with a mix of brick and light-colored siding on its exterior walls. Large, vertically oriented windows are distributed across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The structure includes a prominent protruding section at one end, likely serving as a sunroom or entry vestibule, and a variety of roof heights and flat surfaces. The roof is primarily flat, with some minor elevation changes and parapet-like edges. The window arrangement is somewhat asymmetrical, with clusters of windows on some walls and fewer on others. The main entryway is marked by a small, gabled extension with a door and several windows, giving the house a modern yet slightly traditional appearance.
description: A modern, two-story house with a mix of brick and light siding, large windows, and a flat roof with a gabled entry extension. The design features asymmetrical window placement and a prominent entryway.
description_view_0: The front facade shows a black exterior with large windows and a protruding entryway with a gabled roof.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the brick and light siding, as well as the depth of the house and the arrangement of interior rooms.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a mix of brick and light siding, with a prominent protruding section and several windows.
description_view_3: This view shows the house from the opposite end, emphasizing the flat roof, window placement, and the entry extension.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large vertical windows
attribute_entryway_design: Protruding gabled entry extension with multiple windows and a single main door
